questions.question: Which city is set to host the Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation (APEC) Summit in November 2025?
What was the Gross Enrollment Ratio (GER) in higher education in India according to the All India Survey on Higher Education, 2021-22?
What was the percentage distribution of persons in the age group 15-59 years (both rural and urban) who did NOT receive vocational/technical training, as per PLFS 2021-22?
How many offices of the University Grants Commission are in Delhi?
Who inaugurated the Shri S Ramakrishnan Centre of Excellence at IIT Madras in 2025?
In April 2025, India implemented a standardised curriculum in Himalayan Buddhist monasteries. What was the primary objective of this initiative?​
questions.option_1: To integrate modern subjects alongside traditional teachings
questions.option_3: To convert monasteries into secular schools
questions.option_4: To reduce the number of monasteries in border areas

questions.question: Which city hosted the QS Higher Ed Summit: Middle East in April 2025?

Arrange the following states in descending order based on the number of seats won by the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) in their respective 2024–2025 assembly elections. 1. Delhi 2. Maharashtra 3. Jammu and Kashmir 4. Jharkhand

Regarding the 2024 Maharashtra Assembly elections, which of the following statements are correct? 1. The BJP won more than 100 seats. 2. The Congress improved its seat tally compared to 2019. 3. The Shiv Sena (Shinde faction) secured more seats than the Uddhav faction. 4. The Maha Vikas Aghadi (MVA) alliance was successful in forming the government.
Which country's federal election was held on 3 May 2025 to elect members of its 48ᵗʰ Parliament?

Which of the following statements regarding the 2024 Jharkhand Assembly elections is/are INCORRECT?1. The Indian National Congress won more than 15 seats.2. The Jharkhand Mukti Morcha won the highest vote share.3. Rashtriya Janata Dal won 4 seats in the Assembly.
Where did the International Summit on the Future of Energy Security take place in April 2025?

Where did the fifth session of the Intergovernmental Negotiating Committee (INC-5) to end plastic pollution take place?
What significant financial commitment was agreed upon during the extended session of COP16 in Rome?
In February 2025, five cheetahs were released into which national park of India?
In April 2025, in which city of India did the Central Zoo Authority (CZA) approve the city's first deer park?
In which of the following countries did the United Nations Biodiversity Convention 2024 (COP16) conclude in February 2025?
What was the slogan of the 2024 United Nations Biodiversity Convention (COP16) initially held in 2024?
The Draft Greenhouse Gases Emissions Intensity (GEI) Target Rules, 2025, was notified by which Ministry of India in April 2025?
questions.option_1: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change
questions.option_4: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

questions.question: Which Indian state's/Union Territory's government has announced its Electric Vehicle (EV) Policy 2.0 to reduce air pollution in the region?
What was the theme of the World Sustainable Development Summit 2025?
questions.option_1: Partnership for Accelerating Sustainable Development and Climate Solutions
questions.option_2: Partnership for Approaching Sustainable Development and Climate Change
questions.option_3: Partnership for Accessing Sustainable Development and Climate Solutions
questions.option_4: Partnerships for Accessing Supportive Development and Climate Solutions
